title: integration-catalog-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the integration-catalog-builder.

catalog_name.description: PascalCase name token for the generated integration catalog. Must match pattern `^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$`.

org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the target org used for grounding calls (describe / query). Minimum length `1`.

feature_summary.description: Plain-English one-paragraph description of the integration catalog being built. Should be at least ten words so the builder has enough signal to decompose the catalog; shorter values trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

named_credentials.description: API names of Named Credentials referenced in the catalog (used for Gate C live verification).

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org used for Gate B live-org grounding (`describe_org`, `describe_sobject`, SOQL probes). Optional — when omitted, the builder runs in library-only mode and confidence is capped at MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./force-app`.
